<!--
Template for a SESSION_LOG.md entry. Copy this section heading and
the H3 sub-headings, fill in or delete sections as appropriate, and
prepend to SESSION_LOG.md (newest entries on top).

Not every section will apply to every session. Delete H3s that
don't have content. Don't leave empty placeholders.
-->

## YYYY-MM-DD [(morning|afternoon|evening) optional] — [one-line session focus]

### Landed
What shipped to dev (or to a branch), file by file or feature by
feature. Be specific enough that someone reading later can find what
changed without re-reading the chat.

### Diagnosed / decided
Bugs identified, root causes pinned, architectural decisions made.
Include the *reasoning*, not just the conclusion — future-you will
want to know why.

### Setup for next session
Branches, tags, .bak files, anything that will matter when the next
session starts. State of the working tree at session end.

### Calibration notes
Anything I learned about how to work effectively (or mistakes worth
not repeating). These are gold over time.

### Flagged for later
Things noticed during the session that aren't this session's work
but shouldn't be lost. Include enough context that future-you can
act on them without re-deriving why they matter.

### Out of scope / deferred
Things explicitly chosen not to do, with reasoning. Distinguishes
"we considered X and decided no" from "we forgot about X."
